title: Iris collettii
taxonomy: Iris collettii is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae, commonly known as the iris family. It belongs to the genus Iris, which comprises a wide range of flowering plants. Iris collettii is a type of rhizomatous perennial, native to New South Wales and Victoria in Australia. The plant is known to produce flowers of various colors, including blue, purple, and white. It is a relatively rare species and is often found in moist to dry soils in its native habitat.
